package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for success_response_contains_error_field_or_mixed_contract: Endpoints that blend success and error shapes into one ambiguous contract.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule194NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule194NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule194NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario194Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule194NegativeService, input Rule194NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
